title: stenocalyx sulcatus
intro: Stenocalyx sulcatus, also known as the ridged stenocalyx or Sulcatus tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae and is native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stenocalyx sulcatus include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as an antiparasitic agent. Stenocalyx sulcatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
